notes: Strategy Quality: correct. P16 to P1 in 20 laps with 2 stops (mandatory): stop-1 on lap6 from softs to mediums and stop-2 on end of lap-14 from mediums to mediums. Amazing ERS strategy however didn't pay attention till around lap-5/6 because busy fighting for positions and avoiding contact with other drivers. When started following ERS management was awesome. Pit stops didn't follow one stopper because 2 stop mandatory rule. But when LLM realized it was 2 stop both stops were predicted correctly. Following LLM blindly now!
